name: AlMg3 aluminum alloy Bridge; Building Systems to USLCI
description:
This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Semi-permanent mold (SPM) casting, aluminum - RNA"
AlMg3 is 94.2-97.4% Aluminum (See link below), and according to Ecoinvent, it is cast aluminum
https://www.makeitfrom.com/material-properties/5754-AlMg3-3.3535-A95754-Aluminum/

flow.name: AlMg3 aluminum alloy; at plant
flow.category: Technosphere Flows/31-33: Manufacturing/3313: Alumina and Aluminum Production and Processing

flow.name: Aluminum, cast, semi-permanent mold (SPM), at plant
